action: Check if any story is available in memory for the User and send character dialogues with a 10-second interval.
fallback_action: Share a joke and ask the user to try again later if no story is available.

recipe.steps: Check if any story is available in memory for the User.
If a story is available, send all character's dialogue at a time using the stored conv_id with a 10-second interval between successive dialogues until the story ends.
Once the story ends, check for a new one and repeat the process.
If no story is available, share a joke and ask the user to try again later.

scheduled_tasks.job_description: Check if any story is available for the User and send character dialogues with a 10-second interval.
